# duration

**Instance Property**

The length of the movie or show, in seconds.

## Declaration

```swift
var duration: TimeInterval { get set }
```

## Specifying the Item Details

- **contextTitle**: A localized string describing why the item is shown in the top shelf.
- **summary**: A descriptive summary of a movie or show.
- **genre**: The genre assigned to the movie or show.
- **creationDate**: The original release date of the content.
